Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x54AB "MASTEROFTHELAMPS-07DB-54AB" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07db dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Master of the Lamps.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Put some init code at $07DB to set some needed zero page values which allows a jump to $54AB which is part way through the game startup code. This was the easiest way to skip the code that checks whether a 1541 is connected, as that code is initially XOR'd making direct patching a bit trickier.
